Rod of Lamentation  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 36
DMG: 25 Dmg Bonus: 132
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: -5 WIS: +5 INT: +5 AGI: -5 HP: +10 MANA: +10 ENDUR: +10
Effect: Force (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 8.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

RoL
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2002 at 9:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966060319
4 posts
In my opinion, with all the new(er) stuff coming out of Luclin, this weapon is becoming second rate. I remember it selling for 20-30k back the days, now you'll be LUCKY if you get over 1k for it. I know, I've had one listed in Bazaar first for 3k, then down to 2k, now at 900pp and its still not selling. Sooo, I guess i'll just save it for someday when I make a monk or something.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 08 2002 at 9:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if ur interested getting this rod on AB server ill trade or sell u for a good price and its negociable but ON POVAR plz send tell to OLORYN or JTEKLATE or SAUROR on POVAR thx
Rod
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2002 at 12:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771948127
Scholar
46 posts
Been using this weapon to raise 2hb since early levels. When hasted, it almost feel like swinging a tranquil staff, and infact it's close considering the ratio / proc. Even looks like the tranquil staff (grey translucent staff graphic), the proc rocks I can't wait till level 50 =) These are very cheap on my server, most don't like the stat hits but I can care less. Nice 2hb for any compatible class.

- Cement 33rd warrior
